_meta.principle: GitHub source code, issues, PRs, and project boards are the single source of truth. Every region must map to GitHub state. Internal docs / GTM artifacts / conceptual aggregations are NOT regions.

label.zh: 多 Channel 适配器 (Lark / Telegram / …)

desc.en: RFC #254 + ADR 0008-0013: channel-agnostic abstraction (IChannelTransport / IChannelOutboundPort / IMessageComposer / ConversationReference) replacing the 53-file ChannelRuntime megamodule. Milestone #6 'Channel Runtime Foundation' tracks rollout.
desc.zh: RFC #254 + ADR 0008-0013: channel 无关抽象 (IChannelTransport / IChannelOutboundPort / IMessageComposer / ConversationReference), 替换 53 个文件的 ChannelRuntime 大模块。里程碑 #6 'Channel Runtime Foundation' 跟踪推进

Aevatar-Channel-Multi-Adapter.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar milestone:"Channel Runtime Foundation"

desc.en: ADR 0017 + 17 design docs: surface Team as first-class backend aggregate under Scope. Member workbench, team directory, workspace wording. Milestones #2 / #3 / #8 / #10 / #11 / #12 actively shipping.
desc.zh: ADR 0017 + 17 篇设计文档: Team 作为 Scope 下一等聚合, Member workbench, Team Directory, Workspace 语义。里程碑 #2 / #3 / #8 / #10 / #11 / #12 持续在发

Aevatar-Studio-Team-First.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar label:"team" OR (Studio in:title OR Team in:title)

desc.en: louis backlog this week (2026-W21): #544 (Studio team roster fanout reliability), #545 (move member patch intent into the member actor), #547 (honest Studio team command ACK semantics), #616 (replace ScopeBinding readmodel polling with binding-readiness observation), #543 (activate NyxID OAuth binding projection scope at bootstrap). Spans both Studio team backend hardening and projection/async correctness.
desc.zh: louis 本周 (2026-W21) backlog: #544 (Studio team roster fanout 可靠化), #545 (member patch intent 评估下沉到 member actor), #547 (Studio team command ACK 语义诚实), #616 (用绑定就绪观察替换 ScopeBinding readmodel 轮询), #543 (启动时激活 NyxID OAuth 绑定 projection scope)。横跨 Studio team 后端硬化与 projection / 异步正确性。

desc.en: M14 blocker: refactor ChatRuntime / ChannelLlmReplyInboxRuntime to match Harness boundary (#568). #608 is the umbrella refactor; #596 collapses ChatRuntime into actor-owned Agent Continuation (assigned eanzhao).
desc.zh: M14 blocker: 把 ChatRuntime / ChannelLlmReplyInboxRuntime 重构到 Harness boundary (#568)。#608 主重构 issue, #596 (eanzhao 已 assigned) 把 ChatRuntime 收敛为 actor-owned Agent Continuation

Aevatar-ChatRuntime-Harness.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar ChatRuntime in:title OR Harness in:title

desc.en: M14 pillar — HTTP layer: minimal /v1/responses endpoint on Aevatar Mainnet Host (#611), normalize Responses payloads into internal chat requests (#612), serialize Responses-compatible SSE output (#614), host-level tests + docs (#615).
desc.zh: M14 支柱 — HTTP 层: Aevatar Mainnet Host 上最小 /v1/responses 端点 (#611), Responses 载荷归一化到内部 chat request (#612), 兼容 Responses 协议的 SSE 输出序列化 (#614), host 级测试 + 文档 (#615)

desc.en: GAgentBase / AIGAgentBase / RoleGAgent / ToolManager runtime. Lives in aevatarAI/aevatar-framework, frozen but stable.
desc.zh: GAgentBase / AIGAgentBase / RoleGAgent / ToolManager 核心运行时, 在 aevatarAI/aevatar-framework, 冻结但稳定

desc.en: Console / Studio / core runtime on aevatar-console.aevatar.ai — stable before Show HN
desc.zh: aevatar-console.aevatar.ai 上 Console / Studio / 核心运行时 Show HN 前稳定运行

desc.en: Microsoft Orleans grain model for persistent, always-on AI agents
desc.zh: 基于 Microsoft Orleans grain 模型的持久化永在线 AI agent 运行时

desc.en: End-to-end OAuth 2.0 / OIDC server with MFA, social login, DCR. Recent wizard bugs (#629/#651/#653) prevent mature claim.
desc.zh: 完整 OAuth 2.0 / OIDC 服务端, 含 MFA / 社交登录 / DCR。近期 wizard bug (#629/#651/#653) 不满足 mature

desc.en: Authenticated reverse proxy that forwards agent requests to external APIs
desc.zh: 鉴权反向代理, 将 agent 请求转发到外部 API

desc.en: Auto credential injection — header / bearer / query / basic auth modes
desc.zh: 向代理请求自动注入凭证, 支持 header / bearer / query / basic 四种模式

desc.en: nyxid node start — WebSocket reverse-connect node turns localhost into MCP Server
desc.zh: nyxid node start — WebSocket 反连轻量 node, 让本地服务变成 MCP Server

desc.en: nyxid ssh proxy — SSH-over-WebSocket tunneling. Heavy iteration (8 PRs in past 3 days), not 30d stable.
desc.zh: nyxid ssh proxy — SSH-over-WebSocket 穿透。近期高频迭代 (3 天 8 个 PR), 不满足 30 天稳定

desc.en: Production hosted NyxID. Recent bug cluster (#640/#643/#644) means not 30d incident-free.
desc.zh: nyx.chrono-ai.fun 上的生产托管实例。近期 bug 群 (#640/#643/#644) 不满足 30 天稳定

desc.en: REST API + OpenAPI spec + credentials auto-wrapped as MCP Server tools
desc.zh: REST API + OpenAPI spec + 凭证自动包装为 MCP Server 工具

label.zh: 托管实例快速上手 (< 10 分钟)

desc.en: End-to-end onboarding on hosted instance: register → add credentials → wrap as MCP → verify
desc.zh: 托管实例端到端上手: 注册 → 添加凭证 → 包装为 MCP → 验证连通

desc.en: docker run + 3 env vars one-liner for self-hosted private deployment
desc.zh: docker run + 3 个环境变量一行命令启动私有部署 (M1+)

desc.en: Invite code registration + org-level resource sharing (#641, #577 et al)
desc.zh: 邀请码注册 + 组织级资源共享 (#641 / #577 等)

desc.en: Public landing page (separate repo ChronoAIProject/nyxid-landing)
desc.zh: 公开落地页, 独立仓库 ChronoAIProject/nyxid-landing

label.zh: NyxID M0 — 首个外部用户

desc.en: Aggregator: M0 achieved 2026-04-16. Tracked on board ChronoAIProject #3.
desc.zh: 聚合节点: M0 于 2026-04-16 达成。看板 ChronoAIProject #3

desc.en: Aggregator: 10 activated external WAU by 2026-05-08, unlocks Show HN. Tracked on board ChronoAIProject #3.
desc.zh: 聚合节点: 2026-05-08 前 10 个外部周活用户, 解锁 Show HN。看板 ChronoAIProject #3

desc.en: Semantic search + keyword + category browse for AI skills. No release tags yet, so not mature.
desc.zh: 语义搜索 + 关键词 + 分类浏览。仓库无 release tag, 不满足 mature

desc.en: Interactive skill playground, Node.js + Python via chrono-sandbox
desc.zh: 交互式 skill 测试沙盒, Node.js + Python 运行环境 (chrono-sandbox)

desc.en: ornn-search-and-run / ornn-upload / ornn-build as MCP tools (Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Antigravity)
desc.zh: ornn-search-and-run / ornn-upload / ornn-build 作为 MCP 工具

desc.en: Auth + permission via NyxID MCP. Open bugs (#220 wrong upstream, #106 permission flip) — not yet bridged.
desc.zh: 通过 NyxID MCP 实现认证与权限。待修 bug (#220 upstream 错, #106 权限翻) — 未达 bridged

desc.en: Public skill marketplace at ornn.chrono-ai.fun
desc.zh: 面向外部的 Skill 市场网站 ornn.chrono-ai.fun

desc.en: API for Aevatar agents to pull skill list + metadata
desc.zh: 供 Aevatar agent 拉取 skill 列表 + 元数据的 API

desc.en: Active feature/sisyphus-v3 branch in aevatarAI/aevatar. Sisyphus is PARKED but v3 has 6 backlog issues.
desc.zh: aevatarAI/aevatar feature/sisyphus-v3 分支。Sisyphus 当前 PARKED, v3 有 6 个 backlog issue

desc.en: Receives Automath discovery reports, classifies, stores, advises back (ADR-008). Issues #106 / #107.
desc.zh: 接收 Automath 发现报告, 分类, 存图, 反馈建议 (ADR-008)。Issue #106 / #107

desc.en: ~25K LOC mathlib-free Lean 4 base — 11 modules covering 9 math branches from x²=x+1. Mature by formal verification.
desc.zh: ~25K 行无 mathlib 的 Lean 4 基础库, 11 个模块覆盖从 x²=x+1 推导的 9 个数学分支。formal verified = mature

desc.en: 2,350+ machine-verified theorems and 27 papers (9 submitted to JNT/ETDS/SIADS/APAL)
desc.zh: 2,350+ 机器验证定理 + 27 篇论文 (9 篇已投稿 JNT/ETDS/SIADS/APAL)

desc.en: End-to-end paper generation → AI review → submission via ChatGPT Oracle + Tampermonkey
desc.zh: 端到端论文生成 → AI 审查 → 投稿, ChatGPT Oracle + Tampermonkey 驱动

desc.en: AI-driven Derive → Discover → Name methodology
desc.zh: AI 驱动的 Derive → Discover → Name 方法论

desc.en: 1-person EXPLORING repo, 0 open issues, 0 releases. README + WORKFLOW.md spec exists. Agent-as-person model + GitHub Issues integration + CLI in one Rust codebase.
desc.zh: 1 人 EXPLORING 仓库, 0 issue 0 release。README + WORKFLOW.md spec 已写。agent-as-person + GitHub Issues 集成 + CLI 在同一 Rust 代码库

desc.en: 5 prototype repos (vibe-soulgarden-expo, vibe-riteset-expo, vibe-soul-garden-mongo-be, vibe-soul-garden-web, vibes-aura-polaroid). All 0 issues, 0 releases, 7-10 weeks stale. Meta-region for Aevatar DX feedback.
desc.zh: 5 个原型仓库, 全 0 issue 0 release, 7-10 周无 commit。Aevatar DX 反馈的 meta 节点

desc.en: GodGPT AI companion persona. Shipped v1.32.4-1.32.7 Dec 2025 - Jan 2026. PARKED.
desc.zh: GodGPT AI 伴侣人格。v1.32.4-1.32.7 (2025-12 ~ 2026-01) 已发布。PARKED

desc.en: Shipped v1.32.0 Oct 2025. PARKED.
Shipped pre-2025-08 (v1.23.0 with payments). Open Apple subscription bugs (#244, #284). PARKED.
desc.zh: 2025-08 前已发布 (v1.23.0)。仍有 Apple 订阅 bug (#244 / #284)。PARKED

desc.en: Tolt referral integration on landing page. Shipped v1.32.9 Jan 2026. PARKED.
desc.zh: 落地页 Tolt 联盟集成。v1.32.9 (2026-01) 已发布。PARKED

desc.en: Unify Lark conversation + NyxID Responses ingress under a single router that forwards events to downstream agents. Collapses the two parallel ingress GAgents (ConversationGAgent + LlmSessionGAgent) into thin shells. Paired with GAgent inventory cleanup.
desc.zh: 把 Lark conversation 与 NyxID Responses 两条入站路径收口到统一 router, 事件转发给下游 agent。让两个并行接入 GAgent (ConversationGAgent + LlmSessionGAgent) 退化为薄壳。与 GAgent 清单瘦身配套。

label.zh: 外部入站 → Router → Team 端到端

desc.en: End-to-end demo convergence: NyxID Direct (/v1/responses) and Lark bot inbound channel both forward through the Router agent to a Studio/Team member, which handles the event via RoleGAgent + NyxID + Ornn. This is the visible 2026 Q2 deliverable that proves the chain works.
desc.zh: 三条线收口的端到端演示: NyxID 直连 (/v1/responses) 与 Lark bot 入站, 都通过 Router agent 转给 Studio/Team 的 member, member 用 RoleGAgent + NyxID + Ornn 处理。2026 Q2 老板要看到的可演示成果, 证明整条链路通了。

desc.en: Cross-layer regression coverage for the Inbound → Router → Team chain. #666 Studio member identity / binding / current run cross-layer consistency. #667 LlmSession / ResponsesAgentToolState durable correctness regression. #668 Responses / Messages new main-chain test gaps. #669 Ornn / NyxID / tool credential boundary regression. Owner: YueZh127 (QA).
desc.zh: 外部入站 → Router → Team 主链的跨层回归覆盖。#666 Studio member 身份 / binding / current run 跨层一致性。#667 LlmSession / ResponsesAgentToolState durable correctness 回归。#668 Responses / Messages 新主链缺口测试。#669 Ornn / NyxID / tool credential boundary 专项回归。Owner: YueZh127 (测试)。

desc.en: Backend contract that the frontend Event Intake Lab calls: APIs for creating / configuring an Agent Studio team, binding an intake role to an external event source, receiving Lark bot / webhook events, dispatching them into the agent team, and exposing processing status / results back to the UI. Hides Router agent, Studio member binding, NyxID auth/proxy, and skill/tool execution behind a frontend-facing surface.
desc.zh: 前端 Event Intake Lab 调用的后端合约: 创建 / 配置 Agent Studio team, 把 intake role 绑定到外部事件源, 接收 Lark bot / webhook 事件, 投递给 agent team 处理, 并向 UI 暴露处理状态 / 结果。把 Router agent、Studio member 绑定、NyxID auth/proxy、skill/tool 执行包装在前端可用的接口后面。

Aevatar-Event-Intake-API.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar "Event Intake API" in:title

desc.en: Frontend demo in Agent Studio: create a team, configure an intake role for external events (Lark bot messages), and show the agent team's processing result. Frontend face of the Inbound → Router → Team chain. Direct dependency is the backend Event Intake API contract.
desc.zh: Agent Studio 前端 demo: 创建 team, 配置 intake role 接收 Lark bot 等外部事件, 展示 agent team 的处理结果。Inbound → Router → Team 主链的前端门面。直接依赖后端 Event Intake API 合约。

desc.en: Frontend counterpart to Studio Team-First: Studio member identity cleanup, member-scoped Bind / Invoke / Observe, and chat-like current run console. Tracks open #654 and #655; #652 closed 2026-05-18 as part of member identity cleanup.
desc.zh: Studio Team-First 的前端对应: Studio 成员身份清理、Bind / Invoke / Observe 严格成员域化、chat-like 当前运行控制台。跟踪未关闭的 #654 / #655; 相关 #652 已于 2026-05-18 closed。
